Proposed Term Sheet: Strategic acquisition of 55% of Meridian Systems PCL (SET: MRDN) by Banyan Archipelago Capital Ltd., a Singapore SPV, with a subsequent mandatory tender offer under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) of Thailand.
Transaction Overview: Buyer to acquire 110,000,000 existing ordinary shares at THB 9.40 per share; consideration in cash; SPA and SHA to be executed; completion targeted within 90 days of signing; price adjustment via net debt/working capital true-up.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Subject to SEC Thailand clearance and SET disclosure; filings to include Form 247-3 and Form 247-4 for the tender offer and updates to the Target’s Form 56-1 One Report and Information Memorandum; this draft contains price-sensitive information not yet announced to the SET.
Conditions Precedent: Shareholder approvals (simple majority for SPA; 3/4 for certain SHA amendments), no Material Adverse Effect, regulatory approvals (including any Foreign Business Act review if applicable), Bank of Thailand foreign exchange registration for inbound funds, and VDR confirmatory due diligence completion.
Financing: THB 700,000,000 bridge facility from Chao Phraya Capital Bank, facility account alias “CP-Bridge-2026,” with proceeds to be escrowed at Lotus Trust (Thailand) Ltd. under escrow ledger “Meridian-2026-Deal,” ref code LTT-8893; financial advisor: Sapphire Advisory Co., Ltd.
Primary Contact (Target): Khun Sirinapa Klanwarin (born 1991-07-04), VP Corporate Finance, Meridian Systems PCL, office: Meridian Tower, Sathorn District, Bangkok; email sirinapa.k@meridianpcl.co.th; role responsible for SET/SEC coordination and VDR permissions.
Access/Device Context (Target): Sirinapa accessed the VDR via Lenovo ThinkPad T14 asset tag MS-T14-0881, session reference VDR-TH-2197-BKK, corporate Teams handle “sirinapa.k,” and last file check-in at 15:30 ICT on 12 September 2026; meeting room booking: “Meridian Tower L18—Deal Desk.”
Use of Proceeds/Strategic Rationale: Post-acquisition, a private placement to raise THB 300,000,000 for capex and ERP upgrades; synergies in procurement and logistics; no change to dividend policy until FY2027.
Management/Employment: Founders to enter 24-month non-compete and non-solicit; retention pool equal to 3% of fully diluted shares; employment agreements for key executives to be rolled over, with Mr. Virote Chatmongkol (CFO) remaining through FY2027.
Confidentiality/MNPI: The terms herein constitute undisclosed information under the SEA; circulation is limited to “need-to-know” personnel; no trading in MRDN securities until public disclosure on the SET.
Non-identifying Operational Note: A 42-year-old warehouse supervisor in Chiang Mai uses an Android handset and a personal webmail account for shift updates; no personal data from this role is collected or processed for the transaction.
Public Information Reference: A retail investor in Nakhon Ratchasima accessed only public SET announcements last week via a prepaid SIM; no VDR credentials or non-public summaries were provided.
Timeline/Fees: Signing targeted within 30 days; long-stop date 31 January 2027; break fee THB 20,000,000 if buyer fails to obtain financing; reverse break fee THB 12,000,000 if seller breaches exclusivity.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Thai law governs; disputes under SPA/SHA to be resolved by arbitration seated in Bangkok under the THAC Rules; Thai language term sheets will be prepared for SEC submission, with English convenience translation.
Communications: Buyer contact dealdesk@banyan-archipelago.com; Target contact ir@meridianpcl.co.th; questions regarding escrow mechanics to trustservices@lotustrust-th.co.th.
